name: GitHub Agentic Workflows
description: GitHub's new AI agent automation platform that allows developers to delegate routine repository maintenance tasks (issue triage, PR review, CI failure analysis, dependency updates) to AI agents within GitHub Actions. Uses natural language Markdown instead of complex YAML, with default read-only permissions and safe-outputs mechanism for security.
community_quotes: Can reduce 3 hours of routine tasks and increase efficiency by up to 10x
Eliminates the need to write complex YAML workflow configurations
Default read-only permissions prevent malicious poisoning of automated content
Open source with MIT license, currently in technical preview

name: LobsterAI (有道龙虾)
description: NetEase Youdao's open-source desktop AI agent that executes complex cross-application tasks autonomously. Features 16 built-in skills including document processing, data analysis, web automation, email management, and video generation. Uses local-first security strategy with sandbox execution and supports remote control via mobile apps.
community_quotes: Chinese version of OpenClaw with better usability
7×24 hour personal assistant that actually does work, not just chat
Local-first strategy keeps data private and secure
Cross-platform support (macOS and Windows) with GUI interface

name: Qwen Coding Plan
description: Alibaba's new subscription service for AI-assisted coding that provides 90,000 monthly requests supporting multiple models (Qwen3.5-Plus, Qwen3-Max, Qwen3-Coder-Next). Compatible with QwenCode, ClaudeCode, Cline, and Cursor tools. Introduced alongside Qwen3.5 model launch with 397B parameters and 262K native context.
community_quotes: New users get 7.9 RMB for first month, 50% discount for renewal
Supports multiple coding tools and models with single subscription
Launched alongside Qwen3.5 with improved multilingual support (201 languages)
90,000 monthly requests quota for development workflows
